div.h1: Virtual Machine: Call Frame & Memory Layout
div.p: Ref: Technical Design Specification v4.1 Engineer Notes: Layout optimized for 64-bit alignment.

tr.td: Pop A, Pop B, Push A+B

div.p: Alignment Warning: Frame metadata at 0x28 must remain 8-byte aligned to prevent bus errors on strict ARM/RISC targets. Padding inserted at 0x24.
